summary: Comprehensive P0 fixes testing completed. All 13 features verified: signup job title field, country lock in profile/backend, promo code system end-to-end, View Details same tab, Managed Services naming, duplicate product removal, admin improvements, store personalization, and scope request modal.
passed_tests: Backend: Signup requires job_title field (422 without it)
Backend: Signup with job_title succeeds
Backend: Country change blocked for non-admin users (403 response)
Backend: Admin can create promo codes
Backend: Admin can list promo codes
Backend: Promo code validation returns discount info
Backend: Only ONE Historical Accounting product exists
Backend: Fixed-Scope Development product exists with scope_request pricing type
Backend: Products have billing type info (is_subscription field)
Backend: Admin orders endpoint returns required fields
Backend: Managed Services products exist
Frontend: Signup page has Job Title field (required)
Frontend: Profile page has Country field disabled (locked)
Frontend: Store header shows user's first name (Hi, Automate)
Frontend: Category tabs show 'Managed Services' (not 'Manages Services')
Frontend: View Details opens in SAME tab (no target='_blank')
Frontend: Admin Promo Codes tab with Create button and table
Frontend: Admin Orders table has all required columns (Date, Order#, Customer Name, Customer Email, Products, Subtotal, Fee, Total, Payment, Status, Actions)
Frontend: Admin Catalog table has Billing Type column and filter dropdown
Frontend: Cart page has Promo Code section with input and Apply button
Frontend: Fixed-Scope Development shows scope request modal with all required fields
context_for_next_testing_agent: All P0 fixes verified. Key features: 1) Signup requires job_title field, 2) Country field locked in Profile (disabled input), backend returns 403 if non-admin tries to change country, 3) Promo code system fully functional (admin create/list, user validate, cart apply), 4) View Details buttons use href without target='_blank' (opens same tab), 5) Categories display 'Managed Services' correctly via displayCategory() function, 6) Only ONE Historical Accounting product (duplicate removed), 7) Admin Orders/Catalog tables have all required columns and filters, 8) Header shows 'Hi, {firstName}', 9) Fixed-Scope Development product shows scope request modal with form fields.
mocked_api_notes: Scope request email to rushabh@automateaccounts.com is MOCKED - creates log entry instead of sending real email
